description: The study of image formation using the thin lens and mirror equations.

variable_sub.name: Focal length
variable_sub.description: Distance from the center of the lens or mirror to the focal point (positive for converging systems such as convex lenses or concave mirrors).

variable_sub.name: Object distance
variable_sub.description: Distance from the object to the center of the lens or mirror.

variable_sub.name: Image distance
variable_sub.description: Distance from the image to the center of the lens or mirror (positive for real images).

variable_sub.name: Magnification
variable_sub.description: Ratio of image height to object height.
